нужно добавтить drop down для input письма по каждому events.
один из event это автоматизация в pipelines такм где мы выбираем на stages - notfikations.
оно должо показывать писмьмо что stage deals такого то в пайплайне изменился вот пример html.
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="de">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>DNA ME - Team Notifications</title>
    <style>
        /* Reset styles for email clients */
        body, table, td, p, a, li, blockquote {
            -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
            -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%;
        }
        table, td {
            mso-table-lspace: 0pt;
            mso-table-rspace: 0pt;
        }
        
        /* Main styles */
        body {
            margin: 0 !important;
            padding: 0 !important;
            background-color: #0a0a0f;
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
        }
        
        .email-container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0a0a0f 0%, #12121a 100%);
        }
        
        /* Header */
        .header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0a0f 0%, #1a1a2e 100%);
            padding: 30px;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #2d2d44;
        }
        
        .header-type {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #00d4aa;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .logo {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ffffff;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        
        .logo span {
            color: #00d4aa;
        }
        
        /* Notification Types */
        .notification-deal {
            border-top: 4px solid #00d4aa;
        }
        
        .notification-lead {
            border-top: 4px solid #f59e0b;
        }
        
        .notification-stats {
            border-top: 4px solid #8b5cf6;
        }
        
        .notification-alert {
            border-top: 4px solid #ef4444;
        }
        
        /* Status Banner */
        .status-banner {
            padding: 20px 30px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .status-deal {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,212,170,0.15) 0%, rgba(0,168,132,0.1) 100%);
        }
        
        .status-lead {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,158,11,0.15) 0%, rgba(217,119,6,0.1) 100%);
        }
        
        .status-icon {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            margin: 0 auto 15px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        
        .status-icon.deal {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4aa 0%, #00a884 100%);
        }
        
        .status-icon.lead {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #d97706 100%);
        }
        
        .status-icon.stats {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6 0%, #7c3aed 100%);
        }
        
        .status-icon svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            fill: #ffffff;
        }
        
        .status-title {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ffffff;
            margin: 0 0 8px;
        }
        
        .status-subtitle {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #888899;
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        /* Content */
        .content {
            background-color: #12121a;
            padding: 35px 30px;
        }
        
        /* Deal Card */
        .deal-card {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            border: 1px solid #2d2d44;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 25px;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
        }
        
        .deal-header {
            display: table;
            width: 100%;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        
        .deal-title-section {
            display: table-cell;
            vertical-align: top;
        }
        
        .deal-name {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ffffff;
            margin: 0 0 8px;
        }
        
        .deal-company {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #888899;
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        .deal-value-section {
            display: table-cell;
            vertical-align: top;
            text-align: right;
            width: 150px;
        }
        
        .deal-value {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #00d4aa;
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        .deal-currency {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #888899;
        }
        
        .deal-divider {
            height: 1px;
            background: #2d2d44;
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
        
        /* Pipeline Flow */
        .pipeline-flow {
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
        
        .pipeline-label {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #888899;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        
        .pipeline-stages {
            display: table;
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .stage-item {
            display: table-cell;
            text-align: center;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .stage-item:not(:last-child):after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 15px;
            right: -50%;
            width: 100%;
            height: 2px;
            background: #2d2d44;
        }
        
        .stage-item.active:not(:last-child):after {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00d4aa 0%, #2d2d44 100%);
        }
        
        .stage-dot {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin: 0 auto 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        
        .stage-dot.completed {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4aa 0%, #00a884 100%);
            color: #0a0a0f;
        }
        
        .stage-dot.active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4aa 0%, #00a884 100%);
            color: #0a0a0f;
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,212,170,0.5);
        }
        
        .stage-dot.pending {
            background: #2d2d44;
            color: #666677;
        }
        
        .stage-name {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #888899;
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        .stage-item.active .stage-name {
            color: #00d4aa;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        /* Info Grid */
        .info-grid {
            display: table;
            width: 100%;
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
        
        .info-item {
            display: table-cell;
            width: 50%;
            padding: 15px;
            vertical-align: top;
        }
        
        .info-label {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #888899;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        
        .info-value {
            font-size: 15px;
            color: #ffffff;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        .info-value.highlight {
            color: #00d4aa;
        }
        
        /* Lead Card */
        .lead-card {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,158,11,0.1) 0%, rgba(217,119,6,0.05) 100%);
            border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.3);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 25px;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
        }
        
        .lead-avatar {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #d97706 100%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            margin: 0 auto 20px;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ffffff;
        }
        
        .lead-name {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ffffff;
            text-align: center;
            margin: 0 0 8px;
        }
        
        .lead-email {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #f59e0b;
            text-align: center;
            margin: 0 0 20px;
        }
        
        .lead-divider {
            height: 1px;
            background: rgba(245,158,11,0.3);
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
        
        /* Stats Grid */
        .stats-grid {
            display: table;
            width: 100%;
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
        
        .stat-box {
            display: table-cell;
            width: 33.33%;
            padding: 20px 10px;
            text-align: center;
            vertical-align: top;
            border-right: 1px solid #2d2d44;
        }
        
        .stat-box:last-child {
            border-right: none;
        }
        
        .stat-number {
            font-size: 32px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #ffffff;
            margin: 0 0 5px;
        }
        
        .stat-number.success {
            color: #00d4aa;
        }
        
        .stat-number.warning {
            color: #f59e0b;
        }
        
        .stat-label {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #888899;
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        /* Revenue Bar */
        .revenue-bar {
            background: #1a1a2e;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 25px;
            margin: 25px 0;
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .revenue-title {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #888899;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        
        .revenue-amount {
            font-size: 42px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #00d4aa;
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        .revenue-currency {
            font-size: 18px;
            color: #888899;
        }
        
        /* Action Buttons */
        .action-section {
            padding: 25px 30px;
            background: #0f0f17;
            text-align: center;
        }
        
        .btn-primary {
            display: inline-block;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4aa 0%, #00a884 100%);
            color: #0a0a0f !important;
            text-decoration: none;
            padding: 14px 35px;
            border-radius: 25px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            margin: 0 8px 10px;
        }
        
        .btn-secondary {
            display: inline-block;
            background: transparent;
            color: #00d4aa !important;
            text-decoration: none;
            padding: 12px 30px;
            border-radius: 25px;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            border: 2px solid #00d4aa;
            margin: 0 8px 10px;
        }
        
        .btn-lead {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #d97706 100%);
            color: #0a0a0f !important;
        }
        
        /* Alert Box */
        .alert-box {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(239,68,68,0.1) 0%, rgba(220,38,38,0.05) 100%);
            border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 20px 25px;
            margin: 20px 0;
            display: table;
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .alert-icon {
            display: table-cell;
            width: 40px;
            vertical-align: top;
        }
        
        .alert-icon svg {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            fill: #ef4444;
        }
        
        .alert-content {
            display: table-cell;
            vertical-align: top;
        }
        
        .alert-title {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #ef4444;
            margin: 0 0 5px;
        }
        
        .alert-text {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #a0a0b0;
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        /* Footer */
        .footer {
            background-color: #0a0a0f;
            padding: 25px 30px;
            text-align: center;
            border-top: 1px solid #2d2d44;
        }
        
        .footer-text {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #555566;
            margin: 0;
        }
        
        /* Mobile */
        @media screen and (max-width: 600px) {
            .deal-header, .info-grid, .stats-grid {
                display: block !important;
            }
            
            .deal-title-section, .deal-value-section,
            .info-item, .stat-box {
                display: block !important;
                width: 100% !important;
                text-align: center !important;
                padding: 10px 0 !important;
                border-right: none !important;
                border-bottom: 1px solid #2d2d44;
            }
            
            .deal-value-section {
                padding-top: 15px !important;
            }
            
            .stat-box:last-child {
                border-bottom: none;
            }
            
            .stage-name {
                font-size: 9px !important;
            }
        }
    </style>
<base target="_blank">
</head>
<body>

<!-- ============================================ -->
<!-- TEMPLATE 1: DEAL STAGE CHANGE NOTIFICATION -->
<!-- ============================================ -->
<table role="presentation" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" width="100%">
    <tr>
        <td align="center" style="background-color: #0a0a0f; padding: 20px 0;">
            <table role="presentation" class="email-container notification-deal" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" width="600" style="max-width: 600px; width: 100%;">
                
                <!-- Header -->
                <tr>
                    <td class="header" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0a0f 0%, #1a1a2e 100%); padding: 30px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 2px solid #2d2d44;">
                        <p class="header-type" style="font-size: 11px; color: #00d4aa; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 3px; margin-bottom: 8px;">CRM Update</p>
                        <div class="logo" style="font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;">
                            DNA<span style="color: #00d4aa;">-</span>ME
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                
                <!-- Status Banner -->
                <tr>
                    <td class="status-banner status-deal" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,212,170,0.15) 0%, rgba(0,168,132,0.1) 100%); padding: 20px 30px; text-align: center;">
                        <div class="status-icon deal" style="width: 50px; height: 50px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4aa 0%, #00a884 100%); border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 15px; text-align: center; line-height: 50px;">
                            <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#ffffff" style="vertical-align: middle;">
                                <path d="M16 6l2.29 2.29-4.88 4.88-4-4L2 16.59 3.41 18l6-6 4 4 6.3-6.29L22 12V6z"/>
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <h1 class="status-title" style="font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin: 0 0 8px;">Deal fortgeschritten!</h1>
                        <p class="status-subtitle" style="font-size: 14px; color: #888899; margin: 0;">Eine neue Stage wurde erreicht</p>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                
                <!-- Deal Card -->
                <tr>
                    <td class="content" style="background-color: #12121a; padding: 35px 30px;">
                        <div class="deal-card" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%); border: 1px solid #2d2d44; border-radius: 12px; padding: 25px; margin-bottom: 25px;">
                            <div class="deal-header" style="display: table; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 20px;">
                                <div class="deal-title-section" style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: top;">
                                    <h2 class="deal-name" style="font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin: 0 0 8px;">{{deal.name}}</h2>
                                    <p class="deal-company" style="font-size: 14px; color: #888899; margin: 0;">{{company.name}}</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="deal-value-section" style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: top; text-align: right; width: 150px;">
                                    <p class="deal-value" style="font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: #00d4aa; margin: 0;">{{deal.value}} <span class="deal-currency" style="font-size: 14px; color: #888899;">{{deal.currency}}</span></p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="deal-divider" style="height: 1px; background: #2d2d44; margin: 20px 0;"></div>
                            
                            <!-- Pipeline Flow -->
                            <div class="pipeline-flow" style="margin: 20px 0;">
                                <p class="pipeline-label" style="font-size: 11px; color: #888899; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; margin-bottom: 12px;">Pipeline: {{pipeline.name}}</p>
                                <div class="pipeline-stages" style="display: table; width: 100%;">
                                    <div class="stage-item completed" style="display: table-cell; text-align: center;">
                                        <div class="stage-dot completed" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4aa 0%, #00a884 100%); border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #0a0a0f; line-height: 32px;">✓</div>
                                        <p class="stage-name" style="font-size: 11px; color: #888899; margin: 0;">Kontakt</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="stage-item completed" style="display: table-cell; text-align: center;">
                                        <div class="stage-dot completed" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4aa 0%, #00a884 100%); border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #0a0a0f; line-height: 32px;">✓</div>
                                        <p class="stage-name" style="font-size: 11px; color: #888899; margin: 0;">Angebot</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="stage-item active" style="display: table-cell; text-align: center;">
                                        <div class="stage-dot active" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4aa 0%, #00a884 100%); border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #0a0a0f; line-height: 32px; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,212,170,0.5);">3</div>
                                        <p class="stage-name" style="font-size: 11px; color: #00d4aa; font-weight: 600; margin: 0;">{{stage.name}}</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="stage-item pending" style="display: table-cell; text-align: center;">
                                        <div class="stage-dot pending" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; background: #2d2d44; border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #666677; line-height: 32px;">4</div>
                                        <p class="stage-name" style="font-size: 11px; color: #888899; margin: 0;">Verhandlung</p>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="stage-item pending" style="display: table-cell; text-align: center;">
                                        <div class="stage-dot pending" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; background: #2d2d44; border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #666677; line-height: 32px;">5</div>
                                        <p class="stage-name" style="font-size: 11px; color: #888899; margin: 0;">Gewonnen</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="deal-divider" style="height: 1px; background: #2d2d44; margin: 20px 0;"></div>
                            
                            <!-- Info Grid -->
                            <div class="info-grid" style="display: table; width: 100%; margin: 20px 0;">
                                <div class="info-item" style="display: table-cell; width: 50%; padding: 15px; vertical-align: top;">
                                    <p class="info-label" style="font-size: 11px; color: #888899; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px;">Aktuelles Datum</p>
                                    <p class="info-value" style="font-size: 15px; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 600; margin: 0;">{{deal.date}}</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="info-item" style="display: table-cell; width: 50%; padding: 15px; vertical-align: top;">
                                    <p class="info-label" style="font-size: 11px; color: #888899; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pipeline</p>
                                    <p class="info-value highlight" style="font-size: 15px; color: #00d4aa; font-weight: 600; margin: 0;">{{pipeline.name}}</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                
                <!-- Action Buttons -->
                <tr>
                    <td class="action-section" style="padding: 25px 30px; background: #0f0f17; text-align: center;">
                        <a href="{{deal.link}}" class="btn-primary" style="display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4aa 0%, #00a884 100%); color: #0a0a0f; text-decoration: none; padding: 14px 35px; border-radius: 25px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin: 0 8px 10px;">Deal öffnen</a>
                        <a href="https://www.dna-me.net/index.html?lang=de" class="btn-secondary" style="display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: #00d4aa; text-decoration: none; padding: 12px 30px; border-radius: 25px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; border: 2px solid #00d4aa; margin: 0 8px 10px;">Zum CRM</a>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                
                <!-- Footer -->
                <tr>
                    <td class="footer" style="background-color: #0a0a0f; padding: 25px 30px; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid #2d2d44;">
                        <p class="footer-text" style="font-size: 12px; color: #555566; margin: 0;">DNA-ME CRM System • Automatische Benachrichtigung</p>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                
            </table>
        </td>
    </tr>
</table>

<!-- Spacer between templates -->
<table role="presentation" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" width="100%">
    <tr><td style="height: 40px; background: #0a0a0f;"></td></tr>
</table>

<!-- ============================================ -->
<!-- TEMPLATE 2: NEW LEAD NOTIFICATION -->
<!-- ============================================ -->
<table role="presentation" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" width="100%">
    <tr>
        <td align="center" style="background-color: #0a0a0f; padding: 20px 0;">
            <table role="presentation" class="email-container notification-lead" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" width="600" style="max-width: 600px; width: 100%;">
                
                <!-- Header -->
                <tr>
                    <td class="header" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0a0f 0%, #1a1a2e 100%); padding: 30px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 2px solid #2d2d44;">
                        <p class="header-type" style="font-size: 11px; color: #f59e0b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 3px; margin-bottom: 8px;">Neuer Lead</p>
                        <div class="logo" style="font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;">
                            DNA<span style="color: #00d4aa;">-</span>ME
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                
                <!-- Status Banner -->
                <tr>
                    <td class="status-banner status-lead" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,158,11,0.15) 0%, rgba(217,119,6,0.1) 100%); padding: 20px 30px; text-align: center;">
                        <div class="status-icon lead" style="width: 50px; height: 50px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #d97706 100%); border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 15px; text-align: center; line-height: 50px;">
                            <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#ffffff" style="vertical-align: middle;">
                                <path d="M15 12c2.21 0 4-1.79 4-4s-1.79-4-4-4-4 1.79-4 4 1.79 4 4 4zm-9-2V7H4v3H1v2h3v3h2v-3h3v-2H6zm9 4c-2.67 0-8 1.34-8 4v2h16v-2c0-2.66-5.33-4-8-4z"/>
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <h1 class="status-title" style="font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin: 0 0 8px;">Neuer Lead eingegangen!</h1>
                        <p class="status-subtitle" style="font-size: 14px; color: #888899; margin: 0;">Schnelle Reaktion empfohlen</p>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                
                <!-- Lead Card -->
                <tr>
                    <td class="content" style="background-color: #12121a; padding: 35px 30px;">
                        <div class="lead-card" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,158,11,0.1) 0%, rgba(217,119,6,0.05) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.3); border-radius: 12px; padding: 25px; margin-bottom: 25px;">
                            <div class="lead-avatar" style="width: 60px; height: 60px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #d97706 100%); border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 20px; text-align: center; line-height: 60px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff;">
                                {{lead.name.[0]}}
                            </div>
                            <h2 class="lead-name" style="font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; text-align: center; margin: 0 0 8px;">{{lead.name}}</h2>
                            <p class="lead-email" style="font-size: 14px; color: #f59e0b; text-align: center; margin: 0 0 20px;">{{lead.email}}</p>
                            
                            <div class="lead-divider" style="height: 1px; background: rgba(245,158,11,0.3); margin: 20px 0;"></div>
                            
                            <div class="info-grid" style="display: table; width: 100%; margin: 20px 0;">
                                <div class="info-item" style="display: table-cell; width: 50%; padding: 15px; vertical-align: top; text-align: center;">
                                    <p class="info-label" style="font-size: 11px; color: #888899; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px;">Eingegangen am</p>
                                    <p class="info-value" style="font-size: 15px; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 600; margin: 0;">{{deal.date}}</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="info-item" style="display: table-cell; width: 50%; padding: 15px; vertical-align: top; text-align: center;">
                                    <p class="info-label" style="font-size: 11px; color: #888899; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px;">Quelle</p>
                                    <p class="info-value" style="font-size: 15px; color: #f59e0b; font-weight: 600; margin: 0;">Website</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Alert Box -->
                        <div class="alert-box" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,212,170,0.1) 0%, rgba(0,168,132,0.05) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,170,0.3); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px 25px; margin: 20px 0; display: table; width: 100%;">
                            <div class="alert-icon" style="display: table-cell; width: 40px; vertical-align: top;">
                                <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#00d4aa" style="vertical-align: middle;">
                                    <path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm1 15h-2v-6h2v6zm0-8h-2V7h2v2z"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>
                            <div class="alert-content" style="display: table-cell; vertical-align: top;">
                                <p class="alert-title" style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #00d4aa; margin: 0 0 5px;">Handlungsempfohlung</p>

                {
                  "lineNumber": 39246,
                  "content": "  \"prompt\": \"Explore the notification system in the project at e:\\\\dname\\\\crm_dna-me. I need to understand:\\n\\n1. When a new lead is created, how are notifications triggered? Check src/services/automationEngine.ts, src/services/pipelineRouter.ts, and any event processing code.\\n2. What jobs get added to the 'notifications' BullMQ queue? Check all places that call getNotificationsQueue().add() or notificationsQueue.add().\\n3. How does the notificationWorker (src/workers/notificationWorker.ts) process these jobs?\\n4. For email notifications specifically - does the notificationWorker actually send emails? Or does it just try to send Slack?\\n5. Check the email notification case in notificationWorker to see if it properly calls emailService.\\n\\nReturn: The full notification flow for new leads/deals, and whether email notifications are actually implemented (not just Slack).\","
                },

Hier die Änderungen in Kurzform:

## 1. **Notification Preferences (E-Mail-Vorlagen pro Event)**

- **Neuer Abschnitt „E-Mail-Vorlagen pro Event“** mit **Dropdown „Event-Typ“** und drei Optionen:
  - **Deal-Stage geändert (Pipeline-Benachrichtigung)** – wird ausgelöst, wenn in der Pipeline-Automation auf einer Stage die Aktion „Benachrichtigung“ aktiv ist und ein Deal in diese Stage wechselt.
  - **Neuer Lead eingegangen** – für neue Leads (Import, unbekannte Absender, Cituro-Webhook).
  - **Pipeline-Übersicht (wöchentlich)** – für den wöchentlichen Report.

- Für den gewählten Event-Typ werden **Empfänger (To)**, **Betreff** und **Template (HTML)** angezeigt und bearbeitet. Beim Wechsel des Event-Typs werden die gespeicherten Werte für diesen Typ geladen.

- **Speicherung:** Alle Vorlagen liegen unter dem Key `notification_email_templates` in localStorage (pro Event: `to`, `subject`, `html`). Die bisherige einzelne Vorlage wird beim ersten Laden in den Event **Deal-Stage geändert** übernommen (Migration).

- **Neue Datei** `frontend/src/pages/Settings/notificationEmailTemplates.js` mit den **Standard-HTML-Vorlagen** im DNA-ME-Stil (dunkel, wie in deinem Beispiel):
  - Deal Stage: „Deal fortgeschritten!“, Deal-Infos, Pipeline/Stage, Link „Deal öffnen“.
  - Neuer Lead: „Neuer Lead eingegangen!“, Lead-Name/E-Mail, Hinweis Reaktionszeit, Buttons „Email senden“ / „Im CRM ansehen“.
  - Wöchentlicher Report: „Pipeline Übersicht“, Umsatz, Gewonnen/Offen/Verloren, Leads/Kunden, Ø Deal.

## 2. **StageTriggersModal (Pipeline-Automation)**

- Beim Ausführen der Aktion **„Deal Notification“** (send_notification_email) wird die Vorlage nun aus **`notification_email_templates.deal_stage_change`** gelesen.
- Falls dieser Key fehlt oder kein `to` gesetzt ist, wird weiterhin die alte Vorlage aus `notification_email_template` verwendet (Rückwärtskompatibilität).

**Hinweis:** Das tatsächliche **Versenden** bei „Neuer Lead“ und „Pipeline-Übersicht (wöchentlich)“ muss im Backend noch angebunden werden (z. B. bei Lead-Erstellung bzw. Cron/Job). Die Vorlagen und Einstellungen sind in den Settings bereits pro Event konfigurierbar.

Wenn du möchtest, können wir als Nächstes die Auslieferung für „Neuer Lead“ und „Wöchentliche Übersicht“ im Backend skizzieren oder die UI noch anpassen.

Hier die Änderungen:

## 1. **Deal-Stage-Template (Pipeline-Benachrichtigung)**

Das **Standard-Template** für „Deal-Stage geändert“ in `notificationEmailTemplates.js` ist angepasst. Es entspricht jetzt deinem gewünschten Layout:

- **Header:** CRM Update, DNA-ME  
- **Banner:** „Deal fortgeschritten!“ / „Eine neue Stage wurde erreicht“  
- **Deal-Karte:** Name, Firma, Betrag (table-layout)  
- **Pipeline-Flow:**  
  - ✓ Kontakt (erledigt)  
  - ✓ Angebot (erledigt)  
  - **3 → {{stage.name}}** (aktuelle Stage, hervorgehoben)  
  - 4 Verhandlung (ausstehend)  
  - 5 Gewonnen (ausstehend)  
- **Infos:** Aktuelles Datum, Pipeline-Name  
- **Buttons:** „Deal öffnen“, „Zum CRM“  
- **Footer:** DNA-ME CRM System • Automatische Benachrichtigung  

Die Variable **{{stage.name}}** wird beim Versand durch den Namen der Stage ersetzt, in die der Deal gewechselt ist.

## 2. **Button „Vorlage auf Standard zurücksetzen“**

Unter dem Template-Textfeld gibt es den Button **„Vorlage auf Standard zurücksetzen“**.  
Wenn bei dir aktuell das falsche (Neuer-Lead-)Template gespeichert ist:

1. **Einstellungen** → **Notification** öffnen  
2. Im Dropdown **„Deal-Stage geändert (Pipeline-Benachrichtigung)“** wählen  
3. **„Vorlage auf Standard zurücksetzen“** klicken  

Dann werden Betreff und HTML für diesen Event auf die neue Deal-Stage-Vorlage (mit Pipeline-Flow und {{stage.name}}) zurückgesetzt. Die Empfänger-Adresse (To) bleibt unverändert.

                {
                  "lineNumber": 2454,

                {
                  "lineNumber": 13226,
                  "content": "1. **Frontend-only CSV**: User selects file → browser parses CSV (e.g. papaparse or manual) → map columns to our fields → call POST /leads/bulk with the array. For organizations we'd need a new flow: first create/lookup orgs, then create leads. The existing bulk only creates leads and createOrLinkOrganization in eventWorker uses company_name/company_domain - so actually POST /leads/bulk with company_name and company_domain in each lead already creates/links organizations. So for \"both\" we could: CSV with columns email, first_name, last_name, company_name, company_domain, ... → parse in frontend → POST /leads/bulk. Organizations would be created by the existing eventWorker. So the only new thing is CSV parsing + optional column mapping in the UI. We might still want a dedicated \"clients CSV\" import page that makes the column mapping clear (company + contact columns)."
                },

                  "content": "1. So if the backend sets lead name when creating from email, we're good. Let me check how conversation.lead_name is built - it's from the conversation query which joins leads: COALESCE(l.first_name || ' ' || l.last_name, l.email) AS lead_name. So if the lead was created with name from email, lead_ [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "lineNumber": 10485,

                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"async function initializeWorkers() {\\n\\n  if (mocoService.isConfigured()) {\\n    console.log('✅ Moco Service initialized');\\n  } else {\\n    console.log('⚠️ Moco Service not configured (missing API key or subdomain)');\\n  }\\n\\n  // Initialize Slack Service\\n  const slackService = getSlackService();\\n  if (slackService.isConfigured()) {\\n    console.log('✅ Slack Service initialized');\\n  } else {\\n    console.log('⚠️ Slack Service not configured (missing webhook URL)');\\n  }\\n\\n  // Sync Worker - handles Moco and Slack synchronization\\n  const syncWorker = createSyncWorker(mocoService, slackService);\\n  workers.push(syncWorker);\\n  console.log('✅ Sync Worker started (concurrency: 3, rate limit: 10/sec)');\\n\\n  // Decay Worker - handles daily score decay\\n  if (config.features.scoreDecay) {\\n    const decayWorker = createDecayWorker();\\n    workers.push(decayWorker);\\n    await setupDecayJob();\\n    console.log('✅ Decay Worker started (scheduled: 2:00 AM daily)');\\n  } [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "lineNumber": 2327,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# DNA ME CRM — Final AWS Deployment Plan\\n\\nMerged from Plans b0ab4d72 and b742a208 with expert review upgrades.\\n\\n## Summary\\n\\n| Aspect | Implementation |\\n|--------|----------------|\\n| **EC2** | 2× t3.medium (App + DB) |\\n| **Region** | eu-central-1 |\\n| **VPC** | 10.0.0.0/16, public subnet only (no NAT) |\\n| **DB** | Public subnet, Public IP, SG-restricted (5432 from App, 22 from AllowedCidr) |\\n| **EBS** | DB volume DeleteOnTermination: false |\\n| **Backup** | Cron 3 AM, local + S3 (IAM role) |\\n| **AllowedCidr** | Default 1.1.1.1/32 (change to your IP) |\\n| **Docker Compose** | Pinned v2.29.1 |\\n\\n## Architecture\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\nInternet → Elastic IP → App EC2 (t3.medium)\\n                         ├── Nginx (80/443) + Certbot\\n                         ├── API (:3000)\\n                         ├── Workers\\n                         ├── Frontend (Nginx SPA)\\n                         └── Redis (:6379)\\n                              │ DATABASE_URL=postgres:/ [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5117,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"async function initializeWorkers() {\\n\\n  if (mocoService.isConfigured()) {\\n    console.log('✅ Moco Service initialized');\\n  } else {\\n    console.log('⚠️ Moco Service not configured (missing API key or subdomain)');\\n  }\\n\\n  // Initialize Slack Service\\n  const slackService = getSlackService();\\n  if (slackService.isConfigured()) {\\n    console.log('✅ Slack Service initialized');\\n  } else {\\n    console.log('⚠️ Slack Service not configured (missing webhook URL)');\\n  }\\n\\n  // Sync Worker - handles Moco and Slack synchronization\\n  const syncWorker = createSyncWorker(mocoService, slackService);\\n  workers.push(syncWorker);\\n  console.log('✅ Sync Worker started (concurrency: 3, rate limit: 10/sec)');\\n\\n  // Decay Worker - handles daily score decay\\n  if (config.features.scoreDecay) {\\n    const decayWorker = createDecayWorker();\\n    workers.push(decayWorker);\\n    await setupDecayJob();\\n    console.log('✅ Decay Worker started (scheduled: 2:00 AM daily)');\\n  } [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5293,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"  // Email Sequence Worker - processes email sequences\","

                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# DNA ME CRM — Final AWS Deployment Plan\\n\\nMerged from Plans b0ab4d72 and b742a208 with expert review upgrades.\\n\\n## Summary\\n\\n| Aspect | Implementation |\\n|--------|----------------|\\n| **EC2** | 2× t3.medium (App + DB) |\\n| **Region** | eu-central-1 |\\n| **VPC** | 10.0.0.0/16, public subnet only (no NAT) |\\n| **DB** | Public subnet, Public IP, SG-restricted (5432 from App, 22 from AllowedCidr) |\\n| **EBS** | DB volume DeleteOnTermination: false |\\n| **Backup** | Cron 3 AM, local + S3 (IAM role) |\\n| **AllowedCidr** | Default 1.1.1.1/32 (change to your IP) |\\n| **Docker Compose** | Pinned v2.29.1 |\\n\\n## Architecture\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\nInternet → Elastic IP → App EC2 (t3.medium)\\n                         ├── Nginx (80/443) + Certbot\\n                         ├── API (:3000)\\n                         ├── Workers\\n                         ├── Frontend (Nginx SPA)\\n                         └── Redis (:6379)\\n                              │ DATABASE_URL=postgres:/ [... omitted end of long line]"

'stage_enter', 'lead_created', 'form_submit'\\n    trigger_config  JSONB DEFAULT '{}',       -- Zusätzliche Trigger-Konfiguration\\n    is_active       BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\\n    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\\n);\\n\\n-- ========================================================= [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"// =============================================================================\\n// Route Registration\\n// =============================================================================\\n\\nexport async function triggersRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise&amp;lt;void&amp;gt; {\\n  const triggerService = getTriggerService();\\n\\n  // ===========================================================================\\n  // POST /api/v1/triggers/execute\\n  // ===========================================================================\\n  /**\\n   * Führt einen Trigger manuell aus.\\n   * Kann für Tests oder manuelle Aktionen verwendet werden.\\n   */\\n  fastify.post&amp;lt;{\\n    Body: ExecuteTriggerBody;\\n  }&amp;gt;(\\n    '/triggers/execute',\\n    {\\n      preHandler: validateApiKey,\\n      schema: {\\n        body: {\\n          type: 'object',\\n          required: ['action', 'config', 'context'],\\n          properties: {\\n            action: {\\n              type: 'string',\\n              e [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 16779,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 16910,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"// src/api/routes/triggers.ts\\n// Trigger Execution API Routes\\n// =============================================================================\\n\\nimport type { FastifyInstance } from 'fastify';\\nimport { z } from 'zod';\\nimport { validateApiKey } from '../middleware/apiKey.js';\\nimport { getTriggerService, type TriggerAction } from '../../services/triggerService.js';\\nimport { db } from '../../db/index.js';\\nimport { ValidationError, NotFoundError } from '../../errors/index.js';\\nimport type { PipelineStage, AutomationStageConfig } from '../../types/index.js';\\n\\n// =============================================================================\\n// Zod Schemas\\n// =============================================================================\\n\\nconst triggerActionEnum = z.enum([\\n  'send_notification_email',\\n  'enroll_email_sequence',\\n  'create_moco_project',\\n  'create_moco_customer',\\n  'create_moco_offer',\\n  'create_moco_invoice_draft',\\n  'send_cituro_booking [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 16983,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"  'enroll_email_sequence',\","
                },

                  "content": "I'm adding state to load email sequences when the modal opens, then enhancing trigger actions to inject these sequences as select options specifically for the new enroll action, updating validation and missingLeadActions accordingly.&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;"

                  "lineNumber": 7753,

---


Hier die Änderungen in Kurzform:

## 1. **Neues Layout-Template** (`src/templates/emailMarketingLayout.ts`)

- E-Mail-Marketing-Mails werden im **gleichen Stil wie die Notification-Mails** versendet:
  - Dunkler Hintergrund (#0a0a0f, #12121a)
  - **Header:** „E-Mail Marketing“, Logo **DNA-ME** (mit grünem Bindestrich)
  - **Content:** Dein Schritt-HTML (z. B. `<p>Hallo {{first_name}},</p>…`) in einem Bereich mit Schriftfarbe #e0e0e8
  - **Footer:** „DNA-ME • E-Mail Marketing“

- Funktion **`wrapEmailMarketingBody(bodyHtml)`**: nimmt den bestehenden Schritt-Body und legt ihn in dieses Layout.

## 2. **Versand mit Layout**

- **`src/workers/emailSequenceWorker.ts`**  
  Beim Versand fälliger E-Mails wird der (variablenersetzte) HTML-Body vor dem Aufruf von `sendTrackedEmail` mit `wrapEmailMarketingBody(...)` umhüllt.

- **`src/api/routes/sequences.ts`**  
  Beim **„Test-E-Mail senden“** wird der HTML-Body ebenfalls mit `wrapEmailMarketingBody(...)` umhüllt.

Damit sehen **alle** E-Mails aus Sequenzen (inkl. Onboarding, Willkommens-Serie, Demo Follow-up usw.) einheitlich aus: gleicher Look wie die Notification-Mails, nur mit dem Hinweis „E-Mail Marketing“ im Header statt „CRM Update“.

Die **Inhalte** (z. B. „Hallo {{first_name}}, … Nächste Schritte: … Beste Grüße“) bleiben unverändert; sie stehen weiterhin in den Steps in der DB bzw. im Frontend. Die Zeichen „????“ (z. B. bei „begrüßen“, „Nächste“) kommen sehr wahrscheinlich von der **Zeichenkodierung** (z. B. fehlendes UTF-8 beim Versand oder in der DB). Wenn du möchtest, können wir als Nächstes prüfen, ob der E-Mail-Versand und die Datenbank mit **UTF-8** (z. B. `charset=utf-8` im E-Mail-Header) konfiguriert sind.

Hier die Änderungen in Kurzform:

## Ursache

Die Pipeline-Automationen (z. B. **Deal-Benachrichtigung** und **In E-Mail-Sequenz einschreiben**) haben **keine Einträge** in der Tabelle `events` erzeugt. „Letzte Aktivitäten“ liest genau diese Tabelle; ohne Eintrag erscheint die Aktion nicht.

## Anpassungen

### 1. **Backend: `triggerService.ts`**

- **Nach `send_notification_email` (erfolgreich):**  
  Es wird eine Aktivität für den Lead des Deals geschrieben und eine interne Notiz in der Lead-Konversation angelegt:
  - **Event:** `deal_notification_sent`
  - **Anzeige:** „Deal-Benachrichtigung gesendet“
  - **Quelle:** `trigger` (Automatisierung)

- **Nach `enroll_email_sequence` (erfolgreich):**  
  Es wird eine Aktivität für den Lead geschrieben und eine interne Notiz angelegt:
  - **Event:** `enrolled_in_sequence`
  - **Anzeige:** „In E-Mail-Sequenz eingeschrieben“ (mit Sequenzname aus `metadata.label`)
  - **Quelle:** `trigger` (Automatisierung)

Dafür wird die bestehende Methode `addAutomationToLeadConversation` genutzt (sie schreibt in `events` und legt die Konversationsnotiz an).

### 2. **Frontend: `RecentActivitiesCard.jsx`**

- **Quelle „Automatisierung“:**  
  `SOURCE_LABELS.trigger = 'Automatisierung'`, damit die Quelle lesbar angezeigt wird.

- **Neue Event-Typen:**  
  - `deal_notification_sent` → „Deal-Benachrichtigung gesendet“  
  - `enrolled_in_sequence` → „In E-Mail-Sequenz eingeschrieben“

- **Label aus Metadaten:**  
  Wenn das Backend `metadata.label` mitschickt (z. B. „In E-Mail-Sequenz ‚Onboarding-Serie‘ eingeschrieben“), wird dieser Text als Aktivitätentext verwendet.

Wenn du jetzt z. B. einen Deal in eine Stage mit **Deal-Benachrichtigung** oder **E-Mail-Sequenz** bewegst, erscheinen diese Aktionen in **Letzte Aktivitäten** mit Quelle **Automatisierung** und dem passenden Text.
